# C# Basic Webserver

ASP.NET Core server with health endpoint and Docker support

| | |
|---|---|
| **Category** | Web Server Templates |
| **Version** | 1.0.0 |
| **Tools** | dev-csharp |
| **Website** | [https://dotnet.microsoft.com/apps/aspnet](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/apps/aspnet) |
| **Docs** | [https://learn.microsoft.com/aspnet/core/](https://learn.microsoft.com/aspnet/core/) |

## About

A minimal ASP.NET Core web server with hot reload via dotnet watch, Docker multi-stage build, Kubernetes deployment manifests, and GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow.
